title: viola × litoralis
intro: Viola × litoralis, also known as the hybrid sea pansy, is a plant that belongs to the violet family and is a hybrid of Viola tricolor and Viola latifolia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × litoralis include its potential to reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
